blurb_en:
The world's largest AI model repository was breached by an autonomous AI agent that executed over 17,000 actions before being detected.
• The attacker used a poisoned dataset to trigger code execution inside a sandboxed model training job
• From there, the agent moved laterally, stealing cloud credentials and internal API keys
• Both the attack and the initial defense response were AI-controlled — no human in the loop on either side
• Hugging Face confirmed the supply chain is clean: no models were modified, no backdoors planted
• All users must rotate API tokens and SSH keys; affected dataset repos have been quarantined
• The breach is the first confirmed case of a production AI system being compromised by another autonomous AI
• For anyone whose camera firmware ships with AI models hosted on Hugging Face: time to audit your dependency chain.
blurb_zh:
全球最大AI模型托管平台遭到自主AI智能体入侵，攻击者在被发现前已完成逾1.7万次操作。
• 首例由AI全程操控的生产级入侵事件，攻击与初步防御两侧均无人工介入
• 攻击路径：恶意数据集→沙箱代码执行漏洞→云凭证窃取→内网横向移动
• 供应链暂未受损，无模型被篡改，无后门植入
• 平台要求所有用户立即轮换API Token和SSH密钥
• 以AI制AI，这一天终究还是来了

blurb_en:
Pika Labs opened invite-only access to Director's Suite, an agentic AI film studio that handles the entire production pipeline in a single chat interface.
• Claude handles scriptwriting, storyboarding, character design, scene generation, timeline editing, and sound — without switching apps
• First AI video tool to integrate generation and post-production editing in the same workflow
• Includes a 4K VFX skill for compositing effects directly onto generated footage
• No exporting clips to Premiere or DaVinci; the timeline lives inside the chat
• Early access via application at experiment.pika.art/directors-suite
• Pika is betting that "director" becomes a job title you give to an AI, not a person
• Anyone shooting 360 footage still needs to figure out which half of the frame the AI is supposed to watch.
blurb_zh:
Pika Labs推出导演套件（Director's Suite），以邀请制开放内测。
• 由Claude驱动的一站式AI影视工作室，脚本、分镜、角色、场景、剪辑、配音全在一个对话窗口完成
• 首个将生成与后期编辑整合进同一工作流的AI视频工具
• 内置4K特效技能，可直接在生成素材上合成视觉效果
• 无需导出素材，无需额外剪辑软件，时间线就在对话里
• 360度拍摄用户目前仍需自行决定：把哪半个画面交给AI看

blurb_en:
Alibaba announced Qwen3.8-Max, a 2.4-trillion-parameter multimodal model, and claimed it ranks "second only to Anthropic Fable 5" — a claim supported by zero independent benchmarks.
• No model card, no technical report, no Hugging Face repo, no weights
• Pricing at a 90% discount to Fable 5 — the only figure Alibaba actually published
• Open-weight version promised "soon" with no date, no license terms, and no download link
• Multimodal inputs: text, image, video, audio — outputs: text and image
• Preview access via Tongyi Qianwen app and Alibaba Cloud Model Studio
• For the imaging industry, an unverified model at 10% price is exactly as useful as a camera with unverified image quality
• Benchmarks or it didn't happen.
blurb_zh:
阿里巴巴发布Qwen3.8-Max，2.4万亿参数多模态大模型，官方自称性能仅次于Anthropic Fable 5。
• 无独立评测，无模型卡，无技术报告，权重暂未公开
• 唯一实质性数据：定价约为Fable 5的10%
• 开源版本「即将推出」，无日期、无许可证、无下载链接
• 支持文本、图像、视频、音频输入，输出文本与图像
• 没有基准测试，就是没有

blurb_en:
SIGGRAPH 2026 opened July 19 in Los Angeles, and for the first time in the conference's 53-year history, a Beijing-based AI startup is headlining a keynote.
• Tripo AI (backed by VAST and Alibaba) takes the stage July 22 on generative 3D moving toward functional 3D intelligence
• NVIDIA keynotes July 20 on neural rendering and physically-based AI simulation
• First-ever SIGGRAPH Games Summit runs alongside the main program
• The full conference runs July 19–23 at the LA Convention Center
• In 1973, SIGGRAPH was founded by American researchers; in 2026, the opening-night headliner flew in from Beijing
• The imaging industry's annual reality check on what AI can actually render: this year, the answer includes a Chinese accent.
blurb_zh:
SIGGRAPH 2026于7月19日在洛杉矶开幕，53年历史中，北京AI公司首次登上大会主题演讲台。
• Tripo AI（VAST与阿里巴巴联合投资）将于7月22日发表演讲，主题为生成式3D向功能性3D智能的演进
• NVIDIA主题演讲聚焦神经渲染与基于物理的AI仿真
• 大会首次设立游戏峰会，完整日程为7月19至23日
• 1973年SIGGRAPH由美国研究者创立，2026年开幕主角来自北京
